title: Speaker Disambiguation (Same Name)

summaryCharacteristics: Mentions task assignments to David Chen and David Miller separately

requiredActions.evidence: David Chen: I will draft the infrastructure RFC by Friday.
David Miller: Understood. I will handle the review of that RFC next Monday.

requiredEvidencePhrases: David Chen: I will draft the infrastructure RFC by Friday.

scoringNotes: Verify that full names are preserved and mapped to the correct actions. Assigning either task to only 'David' triggers a critical failure.
assumptions: The meeting has two participants with the first name David, disambiguated by last name.
